This article details [[Toulouse Olympique]] rugby league football club's 2021 season. This was Toulouse's fourth consecutive season in the [[Championship (rugby league)|Championship]]. Toulouse did not take part in the Challenge Cup this season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/55413992 |title=RFL outlines Challenge Cup, Championship and League One structures for 2021 |work=BBC Sport |date=23 December 2020 |access-date=20 May 2026}}</ref>
